packageRules.description: Group each controller image bump with its CRD re-vendor. semver versioning so the metio calendar tags (YYYY.M.D = three integers) order correctly; the default docker versioning does not.

customManagers.description: Bump each controller chart's committed appVersion from the image it deploys. The fully-qualified image is named in a `# renovate: image=...` comment directly above the appVersion key (must match a packageRule matchPackageNames entry). CRD re-vendoring is handled by .github/workflows/bump.yml on the resulting PR (hosted Renovate cannot run postUpgradeTasks). NOTE: the joi chart is deliberately NOT managed here — its per-library JOI image tags default to `latest` (the version is selected in the import path), refreshed by the jsonnet-oci-images pipeline + the OCIRepository re-pull interval + sync-joi.yml, so Renovate has no role for it.
